heading: Federal Acquisition Regulation
label: 3002 Federal Acquisition Regulation
text: In this part, the term “Federal Acquisition Regulation” means the Federal Acquisition Regulation issued pursuant to .section 1303(a)(1) of title 41
notes: CodificationThe text of par. (6) of , which was transferred to this section and amended by , was based on , , ; , , .section 2302 of this titlePub. L. 116–283, § 1806(a)(5)Pub.
